/usr/bin/c++ --coverage CMakeFiles/sensor_node_tests.dir/test_pressure_sensor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sensor_node_tests.dir/test_flow_sensor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sensor_node_tests.dir/test_sensor_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sensor_node_tests.dir/test_lcd_Display.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sensor_node_tests.dir/test_canfd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sensor_node_tests.dir/test_heartbeat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sensor_node_tests.dir/test_doubles.cpp.o -o sensor_node_tests  libsensor_node_lib.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest_main.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a
